title: Fix inspect and tag to accept truncated image IDs
body: Teach inspect about image IDs, truncated and otherwise.

comments.body: ![](https://github.trello.services/images/mini-trello-icon.png) [(3) [buildah] Add a way to inspect working containers](https://trello.com/c/g5hLYG4M/501-3-buildah-add-a-way-to-inspect-working-containers)
Okay, I think this looks less complicated than what it looked like before, and merges in the changes that were in #139.
The changes LGTM, test error is puzzling.  Look like a issue in the manpages?  Maybe a rebuild in hopes it's a hiccup?
Cleared the "ineffectual assignment of err" that the linter caught, customized that error message based on whether or not we had a non-nil `ref`.
Realized that at this point it's easier to have `importBuilderFromImage()` just call `util.FindImage()` instead of duplicating its logic exactly.
:hourglass: Testing commit bc583a8 with merge c119363...

:sunny: Test successful - [status-redhatci](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/c11936323ab9333d0ef17ef4530388ff63b762b8.1496947033593529856/index.html)
Approved by: rhatdan
Pushing c11936323ab9333d0ef17ef4530388ff63b762b8 to master...
